name: brains
description: List connected brains and query across them. Read files from related brains without switching.

name: legal
description: Generate legal documents (NDA, subscription agreement, demo agreement, PSA, order form) from templates.

name: decision
description: Log a decision with context and reasoning. Saves to decisions/ with alternatives and trade-offs.

name: recap
description: Show what changed in the brain since last recap. Use 'recap send' to write a shareable document.

name: write
description: Write anything — blog posts, emails, proposals, docs — using brand voice and brain context.

name: review
description: Code review using the team's coding standards and architecture context from the brain.

name: spec
description: Write a technical spec from a description, using architecture and project context.

name: changelog
description: Generate a changelog from recent git commits across projects.

name: prep
description: Prep for a customer call — pulls account history, recent interactions, open issues.

name: followup
description: Draft a follow-up email after a meeting using customer context and brand voice.

name: status
description: Show brain health — departments, freshness, gaps, and coverage.

name: search
description: Search across the entire brain for a topic, keyword, or question.
